Package com.dtwthalion.ttio

Class SignalArray

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.ttio.SignalArray
All Implemented Interfaces:
CVAnnotatable
Direct Known Subclasses:
FreeInductionDecay
public class SignalArray extends Object implements CVAnnotatable
The atomic unit of measured signal in TTI-O. A SignalArray is a typed numeric buffer with an encoding spec, an optional axis descriptor, and an arbitrary number of CV annotations.

CV annotations are mutable: use addCvParam(com.dtwthalion.ttio.CVParam), removeCvParam(com.dtwthalion.ttio.CVParam), and the query methods from CVAnnotatable. The cvParams() accessor returns an unmodifiable view; mutate only through the CVAnnotatable methods.

API status: Stable.

Cross-language equivalents:
Python: ttio.signal_array.SignalArray
Objective-C: TTIOSignalArray

Since:
0.6

    • addCvParam

      public void addCvParam(CVParam param)
      Attach a CVParam to this object.
      Specified by:
      addCvParam in interface CVAnnotatable
      Parameters:
      param - the CV parameter to attach; must not be null

    • removeCvParam

      public void removeCvParam(CVParam param)
      Detach a previously-attached CVParam. No-op if absent.
      Specified by:
      removeCvParam in interface CVAnnotatable
      Parameters:
      param - the CV parameter to remove

    • allCvParams

      public List<CVParam> allCvParams()
      Specified by:
      allCvParams in interface CVAnnotatable
      Returns:
      every attached CVParam in insertion order.

    • cvParamsForAccession

      public List<CVParam> cvParamsForAccession(String accession)
      Specified by:
      cvParamsForAccession in interface CVAnnotatable
      Parameters:
      accession - the ontology accession string (e.g. MS:1000514)
      Returns:
      every attached CVParam whose accession matches

    • cvParamsForOntologyRef

      public List<CVParam> cvParamsForOntologyRef(String ontologyRef)
      Specified by:
      cvParamsForOntologyRef in interface CVAnnotatable
      Parameters:
      ontologyRef - the ontology reference prefix (e.g. MS)
      Returns:
      every attached CVParam whose ontologyRef matches

    • hasCvParamWithAccession

      public boolean hasCvParamWithAccession(String accession)
      Specified by:
      hasCvParamWithAccession in interface CVAnnotatable
      Parameters:
      accession - the ontology accession string to test
      Returns:
      true iff at least one attached CVParam matches
